details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing; memory_bank/ present with key docs; .cursor/automations/ present with README + specs; reports/audit/ present.

no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory exists at repo top-level with active Python modules (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Per governance evidence (CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal.json, CSA_GATE_BLOCKER_clawdbot_removal.md), Clawdbot/Moltbot integration was marked for removal.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs documenting removal): moltbot/ directory (5 code files), scripts/run_molt_workflow.py (imports from moltbot), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py (references Clawdbot removal stub), scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py (references Moltbot), scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py (references no_clawdbot_moltbot check), scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
